textByHash.08b283464c98b3afb9fd2e02d1cbe76aa055d5dc: I'm afraid you have no Spirit saplings to trade in, come back when you do.
textByHash.0db79734440db8b0c05acb6e65cf5821377e8d99: Would you like to hear more about one of the tiers?
textByHash.15be5b5252b760c74f10e31e55b6cc030dcbbf0e: Of course, I will also take potted spirit seeds and saplings. What would you like to trade in?
textByHash.16bcae4e0f8606a59bc767385c427b3f31294099: I'm afraid you have no Spirit seedling(w)s to trade in, come back when you do.
textByHash.1bbca0eeba6e56ace1812e3f1bad94eda1f4b668: I'm afraid you have no Spirit seedlings to trade in, come back when you do.
textByHash.1dc746355bae035b303c3f41413d78565d244f7c: In the beginner tier you can access farming patches for cacti, allotments, bushes and flowers. You'll also find some shops with useful farming supplies.
textByHash.286a89ab74453781d3cdf65e0d27439352d49cfc: You'll be wanting a reward then. Here's a seed pack.
textByHash.2bcc5d47c495de8b5046ff467b30c382a8947696: Well we always need to rotate the crops we're growing to stop the soil from tiring due to lack of nutrients. It would be great if you could help out with that.
textByHash.458c0fe86e25442033418248fe781da5b7be20f4: The guild is split into three tiers, with only advanced farmers being allowed access to the upper echelons.
textByHash.6141fe3134904d6431f6b264b3ed004e5fbe26ed: Sure, let me know if there's anything I can do for you.
textByHash.63e3b18fc983784dc8d1874f963c42fdd5fc5425: We need you to grow some . I'll reward you once you have checked their health.
textByHash.6be6d2e10d9afc84fc28f4a5dafe029cd67980b3: Please could you grow a for us? I'll reward you once you have checked their health.
textByHash.70121329cad79cc1219bbf3b4bafb063d6e38ce8: We need you to grow some . I'll reward you once you have checked its health.
textByHash.887939f41f7b911481997dfb880ec94809f6014c: Fair enough. Come back when you want another one.
textByHash.89de3c171960afa1850a7cfa84c36937bfb31845: My name is Jane, and I am the founder of the Farming Guild.
textByHash.8b506b703e8b43661e0e7fb7466cd47dc906d198: After the Shayzien Army cleared out the lizardmen in this area, I founded this guild with some fellow Hosidius farmers.
textByHash.8bddaf9fb50fd9926729a9ec602dda3f5eb6b282: In the intermediate tier you can access farming patches for herbs and trees. You'll also find the anima and hespori patches which are unique to this guild.
textByHash.92e3bdf8537bbbf02c37e186c6a9a5e3139f6954: Please could you grow some for us? I'll reward you once you have checked their health.
textByHash.a0abc796959bd4c3a27c5fb0abba9d7a39bb5714: Hey! You need a Farming level of at least 65 to enter that area of the Farming Guild.
textByHash.b168fc403979fcc4a641e26979014c1da5d272e2: We need you to grow a . I'll reward you once you have checked their health.
textByHash.c85d979deaf301653f96fd28620a65bf8c3dfa8b: You'll be wanting a reward then. Come back when you have some room to take it.
textByHash.d952e147ee9fc6fb98ff45a9b4244e43f6ab7900: What kind of contract would you like?
textByHash.da66b111810924e9a2421af8a30876988f96a04a: Hey! You need a Farming level of at least 85 to enter that area of the Farming Guild.
textByHash.daa27d9533c9f913ffac58672b5c83543e32ca24: Please could you grow some for us? I'll reward you once you have checked its health.
textByHash.db09b287b1f60dca17b870372298a42fcee6d514: Please could you grow some s for us? I'll reward you once they have been fully harvested.
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.e5f44680abb916cd3e78ea5983926c2733c6126c: Would you like to hear more about another tier?
textByHash.e6719f3887aa4e3c5cd644c096a779a8ab52ce75: We need you to grow a . I'll reward you once you have checked its health.
textByHash.eb12d08eeab88211d555dd2fe2214998fd8c0c53: The heat of the volcano allows us to grow things here that would never survive in the climate of Kourend. The discoveries we have made are worth the extra risk.
textByHash.ecc63c98decc8b5340e71a5d3419b014122700c2: If you're interested, I can give you a farming contract which tells you what to plant within the guild. Complete the contract, and I'll give you some seeds as a thank you.
textByHash.ee178a82e4f9fd5ff16005dba2d9f6d9a064954f: In the advanced tier you can access farming patches for fruit trees and spirit trees. You'll also find the redwood and celastrus patches which are unique to this guild.
textByHash.ef024bfb170e31c24c53ed9aa98ed40727a4e6ab: While I am letting you pick your own contracts, I won't allow you to pick the same one again. We must ensure that the patches can be rotated to stop the soil tiring from lack of nutrients.
textByHash.ef1e36bdf053cd31bd4802d6b9a489913f8fe40d: I'm afraid you have no Spirit seeds to trade in, come back when you do.
textByHash.f1222c30ab4a5bef8bab6d9a0e110639d9277740: We need you to grow some s. I'll reward you once they've been fully harvested.
textByHash.f9486782fd486e1b15c0664421d03e52ed87f54b: Please could you grow a for us? I'll reward you once you have checked its health.
textByHash.f9a3b8ba11fadd3ea2db632da72043190f6d0109: I'm afraid you have nothing to trade in, come back when you do.
textByHash.fcd4e9e35e55b939afe5d7d85f2e232094906775: Welcome to the farming guild. How may I help you?
textByHash.fe53f1334a7e09eed9cdd59149651ea58efd5ba3: I suppose I could give you a different contract, if you're sure.
